summary: Iteration 10 test: multi-tenant credentials (encrypted), WA 24h window, 6-block prompts, landing pricing/features/FAQ. Backend 14/15 (1 real bug: seeded Sofía CO prompt still on OLD non-6-block structure because seeding uses $setOnInsert). Frontend 100% for all specified flows (9 provider cards, save/test/clear, mask, no plaintext leak, sidebar, pricing plans+toggle, FAQ, CTA scroll to vip-form).

critical.issue: system_prompt still starts with 'Eres Sofía...' (LEGACY) instead of the required '# Personalidad'. Contains forbidden word 'impermeable'. Root cause: /app/backend/server.py:128-132 seeds prompts with `$setOnInsert` — existing docs from previous iterations never get rewritten to the new 6-block structure defined in data.py `_SOFIA_SYSTEM`. Needs one-shot migration or `$set` on version bump.

ui_bugs.issue: After clicking 'Probar conexión', a toast displays 'chatea_pro: [object Object]' — the detail object is not stringified before rendering. Cosmetic but confusing.

issues: faq-item-0 appears open by default; clicking it did not visibly collapse in my run — accordion open/close toggle may be inverted or accessing wrong sibling. Content is present, so acceptable but worth a review.

action_items: Force-update seeded Sofía CO/EC prompts on server start (replace $setOnInsert with `$set` on a version key, or drop+reseed) so system_prompt begins with '# Personalidad' and does NOT contain 'impermeable'.
Fix config `Probar conexión` toast to render detail as string, not '[object Object]'.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py `_ensure_seed`: using $setOnInsert for PROMPTS means every prompt schema change silently fails to migrate — recommend seed by version key.
Landing FAQ accordion default state appears expanded — verify controlled state initializer.
org_credentials: has_value=True when the field only comes from env is by design (combined view). Consider adding `has_org_value` for clearer UX.
test_credentials: X-API-Key: litper_hub_pk_2026_prod_ChangeMe_9x2Kf7bQvE4mLnT8sZ3H; frontend operator gate via localStorage litper_operator_ok=1 + litper_operator_key=<PUBLIC_API_KEY>.
seed_data_creation: Marked WhatsApp inbound for +573001999888 via /api/whatsapp/contacts/mark-inbound during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The one remaining backend failure is a seed migration issue in server.py (_ensure_seed uses $setOnInsert). If main agent fixes, re-run backend/tests/test_iteration_10.py::TestPrompts::test_seeded_prompts. All other flows are verified. Verified NO plaintext leak in /api/config/credentials responses (checked via network capture in Playwright).
rca of the issue: server.py line ~128: `await db.prompts.update_one({...match...}, {'$setOnInsert': pr}, upsert=True)` only writes on insert. The existing Sofía CO doc was seeded in an earlier iteration with the legacy prompt text. When data.py `_SOFIA_SYSTEM` was rewritten to the 6-block format for v3, the DB was never migrated. Fix: bump a `seed_version` field on PROMPTS_SEED items and use `$set` when the stored version is lower, or delete+reinsert idempotently by (name, scope, country, seed_version).
